nasb.text: and I will bring back all the people to you. The return of everyone depends on the man you seek; then all the people will be at peace.”

esv.text: and I will bring all the people back to you as a bride comes home to her husband. You seek the life of only one man, and all the people will be at peace.”

cnv.text: 使眾人都來歸你，好像新娘歸回丈夫那裡一樣。你所尋索的不過是一個人的性命，眾人會平安無事。”

ccb.text: 把他的部下全都带来归顺你。你寻索的人既然死了，跟随他的人必然会归顺你。这样，大家就平安无事了。”
